text: Manipal Hospital on Old Airport Road is a premier multi-specialty 24/7 facility. It handles trauma, cardiology, and complex surgeries. It is known for high-quality care and international standards.
Aster CMI Hospital is a world-class facility with 24/7 emergency services. It specializes in neurosurgery, transplants, and comprehensive heart care.
Critical symptoms like persistent chest pain, sudden numbness, or difficulty breathing require immediate emergency care. Please visit the nearest hospital like Manipal or Fortis immediately.
AuraHealth allows you to manage health history for your whole family including children and elders. Use the profile switcher to keep context separate for accurate history tracking.
Your health data is encrypted. Use Incognito Mode if you wish to have a consultation without saving it to your persistent medical memory.
